texto: This is a little secret that all writers share: We have two lives
autor: the one we live on Earth and the one we live in our books.
explicacao: Citação de the one we live on Earth and the one we live in our books. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “This is a little secret that all writers share: We have two lives” articula reflexao, chrys-fey, little em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
